reviews.review_description:
Pure Barre VR is very well made and offers a complete range of workouts to tone the whole body. I really enjoy the sessions and the overall quality of the experience.

That said, I’d like to share a few suggestions to make it even better:

1. Please allow us to skip floor-based exercises. I tried using the filter to select or deselect the mat option, but it doesn’t seem to change anything.


2. It would be useful to have the option to skip a single exercise if needed.


3. Adding seated workout classes would make the program accessible to even more users.



P.S. I own all the apps in the series, and these suggestions also apply to Pilates and StretchLab.

developer_response.body:
We're so glad you are enjoying the apps! Thank you for taking the time to leave a review and provide feedback. I will pass this on to Product Management.

Joyce
Litesport

PS. There are some seated workouts in StrechLab.

reviews.review_description: I have this app and stretch lab. Both are amazing. They work smoothly and the workouts are powerful. I hope, one day, I can do each without having to stop 🥵.

developer_response.body:
We're so glad you are enjoying Pure Barre and Stretch Lab! I'm sure you'll be able to do the workouts without stopping in no time.

Thank you for the feedback.

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_title: Good but it could be much better
reviews.review_description: It’s a very good app, and the barre method is amazing. It tones and sculpts my muscles more than regular weight-lifting. I also love the fact that you can see the instructor when you turn your head or when you lay down. That part alone is amazing. However, the workouts are short and there is not a lot of variety. Why don’t they incorporate longer workouts of 30 and even 40 minutes? I would give the app 5 stars if there were longer workouts.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback!

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_title: It is very difficult for beginner
reviews.review_description: It is too difficult to follow as it is intense. Even their warm up is already difficult. I hope it can be a little easier as those people who downloaded it are mostly like me who wants to lose weight and currently wither obese or overweight

developer_response.body:
Thank you for providing feedback. Pilates can be challenging when you are new to it. 

Thank you.

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_description:
Unfortunately, the app doesn't work most of the time, mostly with a session timeout error message. I tried several times to restore it to factory settings and reinstall it, but to no avail.

Additional review, sometimes it does work and using it is great experience.

developer_response.body:
I'm so sorry you're experiencing this issue with the Pure Barre application. It appears you also have Club Pilates, but I see that you've completed workouts, so it seems you're not running into the same problem. 

We have not had reports of this issue from other customers. Please contact us directly at support@litesport.com so we can gather more information to resolve your issue.

Thank you.

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_title: Exactly what I was looking for!!
reviews.review_description:
I live in a pretty rural area, so I would have to drive at least an hour (one way) to take a barre class in person.  I've done YouTube video sessions and liked them, but felt restricted by how small my TV is and how hard it is to see and do.  

This app answered all of my needs, is extremely affordable, and was a great workout!  A few more sessions and I'll probably invest in a bar of my own, instead of my dining chair that I've been using.  Thank you so much for making such a fantastic experience!

reviews.review_title: If you can't get on the floor don't purc
reviews.review_description: I had such high hopes for this. I figured barre workouts mean standing workouts. I was wrong. There's pilates style mat work involved and my knee replacement surgery makes that impossible. Oh, well - at least I got it on sale...

reviews.review_title: Real Ballet Fitness in My Own Home!
reviews.review_description: Wow! I never thought I'd see the day when I could do real ballet fitness at home. Ever since I was a boy I've been inspired by Mikhail Baryshnikov, and now with this app I can work out like him! But unlike a live class it's easy & embarrassment-free for us "less-than-flexible" guys because the instructor doesn't mind if I "improvise" ;-) She's tough though! The workouts are no joke. And I didn't think it would matter, but I love the fact that whichever way you turn your head you automatically see the instructor, so I don't worry about missing anything. I love it. I'm still working on the hand-tracking and boundary lines, but they aren't a big deal & I'm sure I'll figure those out later. Highly rated!

This experience is the next best thing to the Studio. Unlike a the Mirror or other screen-based classes, I can see my form in the mirror and the instructor at all times. However! The app only has 38 short 20-30 minute classes available. The fifth star is in hope they add more soon

developer_response.body:
Hey avat.963137,

Thank you for taking time to leave your feedback! We're so glad you loved your experience with Pure Barre. Regarding workouts, there should be 58 if you look under "All Classes".

We hope this helps! Thanks again for sharing your experience.

reviews.review_description: Wow and just wow. Totally worth it. I love that I can see the instructor wherever I turn my head and see my room while working out (optional) it is definitely worth and and way better than owning a smart mirror (yes i have one) or using your cellphone or TV. Way better experience.  Idk why it took me so long to get the quest but now I am glad I am here and happy to have such quality games like this one with zero recurring fees lol 😆

I love it just like I love your other apps like Cyclebar and stretch lab. What is your e-mail so I can Writer to you directly. I have a few interesting suggestions for you.
Thank you so Much and keep on that great work!

developer_response.body:
Hey DDleger,

Thanks so much for taking the time to leave your review! We appreciate it and are so glad you loved the Pure Barre app. Please send any inquiries or suggestions to our development team at support@litesport.com, or directly submit a request here: 

https://support.litesport.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

We look forward to hearing from you!

reviews.review_description:
I am giving this the same review as Club Pilates and Stretch Lab.

Very good value for cost...... And stand-alone rather than subscription now! As much as I would like to try some of the big name fitness apps, I will never sign up for a subscription model.

The Xponential series is well designed and the genius is in the multiple positions of the instructor. You will see your instructor in 6 different viewpoints: in front of you, behind you to the left and to the right...... and if you look down or up, they are there too. No more trying to contort to see what you are supposed to be doing!

I have read that there is disappointment in ⁷the mixed studio reality that although the studio (top half) shows up in color, the bottom half which is your home environment, is black and white. This is true on the quest 2 (which I am using) but in my opinion, does not take away from the experience. I believe that it is in color on the q3. With the mixed reality, you can easily find your Barre, weights etc without peeking under the bottom of your headset.

The only thing I wish was better is the menu. There are 50 sessions available in the all classes. But, if you add up the classes in the sub menus, it seems that there are much less. If th⁶e devs could have all of the classes listed in the sub categories, it would be perfect.

I also purchased the Club Pilates and Stretch Lab and this review will be identical for them. Planning on getting the Rumble Boxing as well..... Unlikely to get the cycling one as I have no plans to get a stationary bike.

The series would be complete if a Yoga one was developed. So devs, if you are listening, please consider Yoga - unless it is already in the works!

Easy to follow along, and I love that you can see the instructor at whichever angle you’re looking during the workout! I just synced my kitchen island countertop as the barre and it worked great! Definitely recommend!

I’m a pretty muscular guy- 6’3 225- and the intense level workouts were brutal.  I’d never tried barre before and between the ballerina vibe and the clips of women horizontally curling two pound weights I was pretty on the fence about buying this app.

It turned out to be exactly what I wanted- a change of pace workout that hits the muscles differently than lifting weights.  The deep core is especially targeted.  I was surprised how difficult the core workout was for me.  I hit abs pretty hard and try to work my transverse abdominus but the short movements and focus on the pelvic muscles was new for me.

I don’t usually leave reviews but I feel like they did a great job with this app.  Being able to see the trainer whichever way you look- even down at the floor, was a nice touch.

UPDATE: months later I’m an even bigger fan of this app.  It’s improved my mind muscle connection to my pelvic muscles in a way no other workout has.   Great core workouts as well.  Incredible value

Tried 4 out 5 of these
 fitness app, and it caters for everyone  I would really recommend  p.s no bike so I can't use that one yet.
